headline: Trump Soothes Market’s Iran Fears. Why the Threat’s Not Over for Stocks, Oil.
summary: Diesel fuel prices are sending an economic warning, airlines face higher jet fuel prices, long security lines, Oracle’s cloud push is fueling growth, and more news to start your day.

headline: Is Starboard’s Cost Push And S&P 500 Exit Altering The Investment Case For Lamb Weston (LW)?
summary: In early March 2026, Starboard Value LP sent a public letter to Lamb Weston’s CEO and board urging doubled cost-saving efforts, sharper SG&A cuts, and a review of international operations, including possible divestiture of select APAC assets. This activism followed news that Lamb Weston will be removed from the S&P 500 in the upcoming quarterly rebalance, highlighting how index status changes can quickly attract investor pressure for operational reshaping. We’ll now examine how Starboard’s...
